pages.title: Poltergeist
pages.text: They are invisible, mischievous entities that can be quite dangerous. They seek chaos and will open doors, throw objects, open chests, and even attack players.

pages.title: Revealing Poltergeists
pages.description: Using a $(l:kettle/kettle_intro#revealing)Brew of Revealing$(/l) reveals their true form, negating their innate invisibility.
pages._comment: Unlocked when player uses Brew of Revealing on a Poltergeist (TODO)

pages.title: Buffing Health
pages.description: If a player summons a Poltergeist from a $(l:artifacts/misc/spectral_stone)Spectral Stone$(/l), they can spray a bit of $(l:resources/graveyard_dust)Graveyard Dust$(/l) over them to greatly increase their health. Each Graveyard Dust increases their health by 2 points, up to a maximum of 50.
pages._comment: Unlocked when player uses Brew of Revealing on a Poltergeist (TODO)
